Yatxatäwi jiskt'awima qillqt'am, ukatsti jank'a Single Shot jaysawi jan ukax taqpach Agentic lurawi thakhi ajllim.
card.main_menu.body_1.label: Yatxatäwi jiskt'awi
card.main_menu.speak: Deep Research Digital Worker ukar wali suma jutäwi. Jiskt'awima qillqt'am, ukatsti chiqak jaysañatakix Single Shot ajllim jan ukax wakichawi ukhamaraki phuqhawi lurañatakix Agentic ajllim.
